description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push and pull request events with a concurrency policy that cancels in-progress jobs for the same workflow and event. Use a ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to build and test on multiple Linux distributions (alpine, archlinux, debian, fedora, opensuse, gentoo) and C++ standard (c++20). For each matrix combination, run the workflow in a container based on the distribution, check out the code, configure the build with meson, build with ninja, and run tests with make.
